expo.name: QuickHelp
expo.description: QuickHelp connects people who need everyday assistance with nearby volunteers. Post a request, find a helper, earn XP, and build a stronger community — one small act of kindness at a time.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: QuickHelp uses your location to find help requests and volunteers near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: QuickHelp uses your location to find help requests and volunteers near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: QuickHelp needs camera access to let you upload photos for your help requests.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: QuickHelp needs photo library access to let you add images to your help requests.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: QuickHelp needs microphone access for voice messages.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: QuickHelp sends notifications about your tasks, matches, and messages.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: QuickHelp uses your location to find nearby help requests and volunteers.
